preflight.note: Recorded from the RELEASE_LABEL design discussion before the validator, spec, and conformance changes were implemented.

acceptance_criteria.text: A new §4 validation rule accepts an optional root RELEASE_LABEL file as a SemVer pre-release whose MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH core equals VERSION, rejects a label whose core diverges from VERSION or is not a SemVer pre-release, and constrains nothing when the file is absent.

SPEC records RELEASE_LABEL in the repository layout, §4.7, and §8, and the conformance manifest inventories SPEC-4-release-label with a passing accept fixture and a rejecting core-mismatch fixture; bidirectional coverage holds.
The change is additive: VERSION, suite_version, and the adopter fleet are untouched, and governance validation, the conformance suite, and the full test suite pass on the resulting tree.
